prompt:
Goal: Create an anime fantasy character design sheet for a young male “novice veteran” adventurer, combining modern streetwear with magical blue flame effects.

Canvas: Wide horizontal character reference sheet, parchment-white background with faint ornamental patterns, thin gold decorative border and ornate corner flourishes, clean concept-art presentation.

Main title and text: Top-left title reads “✦ Novice Veteran ✦” with the subtitle “新手老兵” underneath. Include a short Chinese flavor paragraph on the left about an adventurer from another world who can control ice fire and becomes a trusted companion. Add the Chinese section labels “正面”, “側面”, and “背面” above the three full-body views. Use small Chinese labels for detail callouts.

Character: Show Novice Veteran, a young adult male fantasy swordsman with short spiky white hair with pale blue highlights, athletic slim build, pale skin, confident relaxed posture, and a deliberately blurred or obscured face. Outfit is bright cobalt-blue bomber jacket with subtle floral patterning, high collar, ribbed cuffs and hem, black shirt, black belt, fitted black trousers, and glossy black combat boots. Surround the character with icy blue magical flames rising behind him.

Layout: Use exactly 3 full-body character views: 1 front view on the left-center holding a blue crystal sword downward in one hand with the other hand in his pocket, 1 side view in the center-right with one hand in his pocket, and 1 back view on the far right showing the jacket pattern and flame aura. Add 1 standalone sword illustration on the far left, vertical, labeled “騎士劍”. Add 5 circular color swatches under the color scheme label: white, pale sky blue, vivid blue, dark navy, and charcoal black.

Detail callouts: Place exactly 6 circular detail insets in the middle column: 1 hair detail from the back labeled “髮型細節”, 1 head/back collar detail labeled “頭部細節”, 1 collar detail labeled “領口細節”, 1 jacket floral texture close-up labeled “夾克紋理細節”, and 2 boot/leg design circles at the bottom labeled left foot and right foot with the heading “褲子設計（左右相同）”.

Weapon: The sword should be a long knightly crystal blade with silver guard, blue gemstone accents, and glowing translucent blue edges; show it once as a separate weapon and once held by the front-view character.

Visual style: High-quality anime concept art, crisp linework, polished cel shading, luminous blue gradients, refined fantasy game character sheet aesthetic, elegant but readable typography, no extra characters, no watermark.
